text: Here's what science actually says about adrenal stress response. When we face stress, our body triggers the adrenal glands to release hormones like cortisol. But what happens when this response is overactive? It can lead to anxiety, fatigue, and even chronic illness. Research shows that prolonged stress can alter DNA expression. Yes, stress can actually change your genes! Understanding this response helps us manage stress better and improve our overall health. Want to dive deeper into your health? Follow for more science-based insights!
